classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标区域为A-A剖视机械结构图，包含转子螺纹、定子前安装、螺纹孔、装配孔位和尺寸标注，如'M1.6 thread hole'、'2.90'、'5.40'、'1.40 -0.20'及'+0.20'公差，属于电机零部件安装与配合尺寸说明。

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Front-install stator configuration with M1.6 threaded hole and M2 pull-out/fastening note.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Outer and inner rotor thread and fit ID interfaces are labeled, but numeric diameter/thread values are not visible in the OCR source for this crop.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Visible axial dimensions include 2.90 mm and 5.40 mm; axial installation tolerance is 1.40 mm +0.20/-0.20.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: No connector-specific annotation with reliable OCR source is present in this crop.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Numeric values for outer rotor thread, inner rotor thread, outer rotor fit ID, inner rotor fit ID, and stator fit OD are not specified in the available OCR text.

unresolved_items.issue: Low-confidence or overlapping OCR fragments/noise from lines, arrows, or partial text were not used as final annotations.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标区域为A-A剖视结构图，标注'Stator'、'(Front/Back install)'以及'Stator boss is apex'、'Back install directly'，展示定子安装方向、凸台定位和剖面结构关系，属于机械安装结构与尺寸类内容。

text_annotations.correction_note: Corrected missing space in OCR text: (Front/Backinstall) -> (Front/Back install)
Restored spaces from OCR text: Statorbossisapex -> Stator boss is apex
Restored spaces from OCR text: Backinstalldirectly -> Back install directly

terminology_notes: OCR fragments ocr_004, ocr_005 and ocr_006 were treated as line/geometry noise, not usable text annotations.
translation_notes: Stator translated as 定子; front/back install translated as 前/后安装.

quality_control.origin_src_semantics: 5x crop before structure border trim; backend original data image
quality_control.target_src_semantics: structure-only crop after border trim; backend processed data image

items: 抽查 5x 裁切图清晰度和结构图去边效果
抽查 AI 命名、分类、标签合并、完整翻译和简单翻译质量
抽查 v2 JSON 是否满足后台拆解对比和人工复核需要
